Class ADiscordOAuthService

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.service.ADiscordOAuthService
public abstract class ADiscordOAuthService extends Object
Base service for handling Discord OAuth2 flow with Javalin.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ADiscordOAuthService(DiscordOAuth config, String host)
    Creates a new Discord OAuth service.

    refreshExpiredTokens()
     
    void
    start()
    Starts the scheduled task refreshExpiredTokens()
    void
    startDiscordLogin(io.javalin.http.Context ctx)
    Starts the Discord login flow by redirecting the user to Discord.

    Handle the user after an oauth token was issued.

  • Constructor Details

    • ADiscordOAuthService

      public ADiscordOAuthService(DiscordOAuth config, String host)
      Creates a new Discord OAuth service.
      Parameters:
      config - The Discord OAuth configuration
      host - The frontend host to redirect back to after login

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the scheduled task refreshExpiredTokens()

    • refreshExpiredTokens

      protected void refreshExpiredTokens()

    • getExpiringtokens

      protected abstract List<? extends IOAuthToken> getExpiringtokens(Instant instant)
      Get the tokens that will expire before the given instant.
      Parameters:
      instant - the instant to check
      Returns:
      the tokens that will expire before the given instant
      See Also:
      • IOAuthToken

    • startDiscordLogin

      public void startDiscordLogin(io.javalin.http.Context ctx)
      Starts the Discord login flow by redirecting the user to Discord.

      A 'state' query parameter can be provided to be passed back after login.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The Javalin context

    • handleDiscordCallback

      public void handleDiscordCallback(io.javalin.http.Context ctx)
      Handles the callback from Discord after the user has authorized the application.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The Javalin context

    • storeToken

      public abstract String storeToken(DiscordUser user, TokenResponse token)
      Handle the user after an oauth token was issued.
      Parameters:
      user - the user
      token - the token
      Returns:
      An access token that can be used to authenticate the user in the backend.

    • client

      public DiscordClient client()
      Get the Discord client used by this service.
      Returns:
      the Discord client
